content.icon.title: Icon content
content.icon.description: A canonical accessible icon authoring contract for documentation content.
limitations: Runtime bytes do not establish a safe authoring API.

gap.reason: The pinned runtime contains an icon element but no canonical authoring manifest.
gap.fallback: Use meaningful text or a Unicode symbol that remains understandable without decoration.
gap.admission_condition: Publish and pin a canonical icon authoring and accessibility contract, then add Docara schema, rendering, tests and documentation.

docara.card.title: Card
docara.card.description: Groups related Markdown content on a neutral bounded surface.
limitations: Nested Docara typed directives are not accepted.

docara.columns.title: Columns
docara.columns.description: Arranges two to four source-ordered Markdown regions in a responsive Simai Framework grid.
limitations: The body must contain between two and four non-empty Markdown regions.
Regions must use an exact top-level --- separator surrounded by blank lines.
Nested Docara typed directives and Smart components are not accepted.
Column order always follows source order.

docara.cta.title: CTA link
docara.cta.description: Turns one safe Markdown link into a prominent native navigation action.
limitations: The body must contain exactly one safe Markdown link.
The result is a native link and does not claim an executable Smart action.

docara.features.title: Feature list
docara.features.description: Presents a short source-ordered list of product capabilities as a responsive grid.
limitations: The body must contain one flat unordered list with two to six items.
Nested lists, blocks and Docara directives are not accepted.

docara.steps.title: Steps
docara.steps.description: Shows a short ordered sequence of actions.
limitations: The body must contain exactly one ordered Markdown list.
Nested Docara directives are not accepted.

native.code.title: Code
native.code.description: Renders inline and fenced Markdown code; the pinned Simai Framework progressively adds one language-and-copy header, syntax highlighting and line numbers.
limitations: Without the pinned runtime the readable static pre/code fallback remains; fine-grained highlighting and line controls are not exposed.

native.code.enhanced.title: Configurable code
native.code.enhanced.description: Editor-grade code blocks with optional line numbers, highlighted lines, diff states and other author controls.
limitations: Fine-grained author controls are not part of the admitted Framework contract.

gap.reason: No admitted contract exposes optional line numbers, highlighted lines, diff states or other editor-grade controls.
gap.fallback: Use native.code; the pinned Simai Framework already provides language, copy, syntax highlighting, line numbers and local overflow.
gap.admission_condition: Add the controls to Simai Framework with accessibility and fallback contracts, then admit them through deterministic projection, tests, documentation and browser acceptance.

native.headings_and_text.title: Headings and text
native.headings_and_text.description: Structures prose with headings, paragraphs, emphasis, strong text and strikethrough.
limitations: Raw HTML is not accepted as an authoring shortcut.

native.links_and_images.title: Links and images
native.links_and_images.description: Adds safe destinations and images with author-provided accessible text.
limitations: Unsafe link protocols are rejected.
Authors remain responsible for useful image alternative text.

native.lists_and_quotes.title: Lists and quotes
native.lists_and_quotes.description: Expresses ordered or unordered collections and semantic quotations.

native.table.title: Markdown table
native.table.description: Presents small comparison or reference data in a scroll-safe semantic table.
limitations: This is a native Markdown table, not a structured DataView contract.

ui.alert.title: Alert
ui.alert.description: Reports a result, warning, or error as presentation-only content in portable Docara.
limitations: closable=true is not admitted by the current bounded runtime.
type=success is not admitted because the pinned Framework stylesheet renders its status icon transparent.
The id property is generated deterministically by Docara.
The Larena backend event bridge is intentionally omitted; portable Docara renders this component without backend handlers.

aria-label.label: Aria label
aria-label.description: Optional author override for exact manifest property [aria-label].

closable.label: Closable
closable.description: Optional author override for exact manifest property [closable].

icon.label: Icon
icon.description: Optional author override for exact manifest property [icon].

supporting-text.label: Supporting text
supporting-text.description: Optional author override for exact manifest property [supporting-text].

title.label: Title
title.description: Optional author override for exact manifest property [title].

type.label: Tone
type.description: Optional author override for exact manifest property [type].

variant.label: Variant
variant.description: Optional author override for exact manifest property [variant].

ui.badge.title: Badge
ui.badge.description: A compact status label based on an exact upstream Smart manifest.
limitations: The upstream manifest exists, but Docara has not admitted it.

gap.reason: Docara has no bundled badge manifest, immutable lock record, projected assets or authoring tests.
gap.fallback: Use plain emphasized text that states the status directly.
gap.admission_condition: Bundle the exact upstream manifest, pin its provider revision and assets, forbid author-managed IDs, and pass schema, rendering, documentation and browser acceptance.

ui.button.title: Button
ui.button.description: Renders a bounded visual action control; portable Docara does not bind data, navigate, or execute an effect.
limitations: Docara renders the control but does not bind application data or execute an effect.
Navigation remains the job of a native link or docara.cta.
The Larena backend event bridge is intentionally omitted; portable Docara renders this component without backend handlers.

aria-label.label: Aria label
aria-label.description: Optional author override for exact manifest property [aria-label].

disabled.label: Disabled
disabled.description: Optional author override for exact manifest property [disabled].

loading.label: Loading
loading.description: Optional author override for exact manifest property [loading].

native-type.label: Native type
native-type.description: Optional author override for exact manifest property [native-type].

preset.label: Preset
preset.description: Exact manifest preset merged before explicit props.

radius.label: Corner radius
radius.description: Optional author override for exact manifest property [radius].

scheme.label: Scheme
scheme.description: Optional author override for exact manifest property [scheme].

size.label: Size
size.description: Optional author override for exact manifest property [size].

text.label: Text
text.description: Optional author override for exact manifest property [text].

type.label: Type
type.description: Optional author override for exact manifest property [type].

ui.dataview.title: Data view
ui.dataview.description: A structured data and settings contract for interactive data presentation.
limitations: This is a different author job from a small Markdown table.

gap.reason: No bounded portable data source, settings, interaction and rendering contract is accepted for Docara.
gap.fallback: Use the supported native.table entry for small reference data.
gap.admission_condition: Define a separate portable data and settings contract with deterministic rendering, accessibility, tests and documentation.

ui.tabs.title: Tabs
ui.tabs.description: An accessible tab set with complete keyboard, focus and ARIA relationships.
limitations: The pinned Core and Smart sources do not provide the complete accepted accessibility contract.
Docara has no admitted tabs manifest or runtime lock record.

gap.reason: Keyboard focus movement, Home and End behaviour, stable tab-panel ARIA linkage and an admitted manifest are incomplete.
gap.fallback: Use headings and source-ordered sequential sections.
gap.admission_condition: Publish a canonical accessible tabs contract and manifest, pin a new immutable Framework pair and provider revision, then pass Docara schema, asset, rendering and browser acceptance.
